utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: And I was gonna go over and say hi ! but then I figured , he does not care if he looks like you .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: That just cost me four bucks . But uh listen , I just called to see how the chick and the duck are doing ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Ohh , they are having a great time with their Aunt Phoebe !

utterances.text: Kinda , but I have just been having way too much fun .

utterances.text: So you are not homesick yet ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: All right , the seven of us miss you .
